description: CompositionOlive green track suitTrack jacket made of 100% polyester, has long raglan sleeves with blue piping details and ribbed cuffs, mock neck, zippered closure on the front, insert pockets on the sides, brand details printed on the upper left chest and a ribbed hemlineTrack pant made of 100% polyester, has a wide elasticated waistband with drawcord on the inside, insert pockets on the sides, printed swoosh logo on the left leg, welt pocket on the right hip with brand patch appliqued above it and blue piping on the side seamsFittingRegularWash careMachine was cold separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleachCool iron and do not iron designDo not dry cleanLook on trend while training in this olive green tracksuit from the Athletic Department collection of nike. The polyester fabric provides greater comfort and allows you to train longer. The tracksuit can be worn together or separately and works perfect for gym sessions or sporting activities. The track jacket can be worn with tees and jeans as well.
